Descubra.meta_desc: The AI that applies your nutritionist's method. The right answer, 24/7, with your nutritionist's protocol.
Descubra.hero_title:
The AI that applies
your nutritionist's method.
Descubra.hero_subtitle: The right method. The right answer. Whenever you need it.

ParaExperts.meta_desc: Set it up once. Your clients get 24/7 answers with your protocol.
ParaExperts.hero_title:
Your AI. For every client.
At the same time.
ParaExperts.hero_subtitle: Set it up once. Your clients get 24/7 answers with your protocol. You scale, without splitting yourself.
ParaExperts.section_steps_title: Three steps to scale your methodology.
ParaExperts.closing_title:
Built for those with a method.
Not for those who improvise.
ParaExperts.closing_desc: MyNutri doesn't dictate the rules — it executes yours. For every client. At the same time.
ParaExperts.expert_benefit_1_desc: yourname.mynutri.pro — for your client, it's 100% your brand and your technology.
ParaExperts.expert_benefit_2_desc: Trivial questions go to the AI; your time goes to what only you can do.
ParaExperts.expert_benefit_3_desc: It doesn't make things up, doesn't improvise, doesn't leave your methodology.
ParaExperts.expert_benefit_4_desc: "24/7 access to my exclusive AI" justifies and elevates your price.
ParaExperts.expert_benefit_5_desc: Without losing quality, technical precision, or your identity.
ParaExperts.client_benefit_1_desc: Question at the grocery store, gym, or midnight: answered.
ParaExperts.client_benefit_2_desc: No waiting for a WhatsApp reply or your next appointment.
ParaExperts.client_benefit_3_desc: No guesswork, no internet, just the nutritionist's protocol.
ParaExperts.client_benefit_4_desc: Food substitution, restaurant menu, label reading — right now.
ParaExperts.client_benefit_5_desc: Less doubt, fewer mistakes, more plan execution.
ParaExperts.step_1_desc: In your own words, you define the protocol: method, priorities, response style.
ParaExperts.step_2_desc: Your ecosystem ready in minutes. Exclusive subdomain, management panel, personalized invites.
ParaExperts.step_3_desc: Your clients access with the invite link. The AI answers for you — without you being there.

Assinar.meta_title: Join MyNutri — Build your AI-powered space

ForgotPassword.desc: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.

ResetPassword.title: New password
ResetPassword.desc: Choose a password with at least 6 characters.

ResetPassword.expired_desc: This reset link is no longer valid. Request a new one below.

Convite.check_email_desc: We sent an access link to <bold>{email}</bold>.

Painel.title: Dashboard
Painel.invite_whatsapp_msg:
Hi! {name} invited you to access {appName}. Click the link below to activate your account:

{url}
Painel.visibility_desc: Appear on the /experts page for new clients
Painel.app_customization_desc: Choose how the assistant will present itself to your clients.
Painel.ai_prompt_desc: This text is sent to the AI before each client analysis. Use it to define tone, focus, and specific guidelines for your approach.
Painel.ai_prompt_placeholder: E.g.: You are a specialist in human performance. Always prioritize evidence-based data…
Painel.invite_email_warn: Invite created, but the email could not be sent. Please share the link manually.
Painel.trial_expired_desc: Subscribe to MyNutri to keep supporting your clients with personalized AI.
Painel.subdomain_cooldown: You can change your subdomain once every 30 days.
Painel.subdomain_warning: Warning: your old subdomain will stop working in 30 days. This may impact SEO and can only be done once a month.
Painel.subdomain_changed: Subdomain changed! You will be redirected.
Painel.onboarding_step1_title: Welcome! Let's set up your profile
Painel.onboarding_step1_desc: Add your photo, name and specialty to appear in the directory.
Painel.onboarding_step2_desc: This is how your clients will find you.
Painel.onboarding_step3_desc: Generate an invite link and share it with a client.
Painel.onboarding_step4_desc: Your space is ready. Your clients can now access it.
Painel.unsaved_confirm: You have unsaved changes. Leave without saving?
Painel.gp_description: Upload materials about your methodology (PDFs, images, audio, video or text) so the AI can analyze your style and automatically generate a personalized prompt.
Painel.gp_upload_label: Drag files or click to select
Painel.gp_upload_hint: PDF, images, audio, video or text · 15 MB total max · up to 10 files
Painel.gp_state_review: Prompt generated! Review and edit as needed.
Painel.gp_err_limit_reached: You have reached the limit of 10 generations this month.
Painel.gp_err_invalid_files: Total exceeds 15 MB. Remove some files.
Painel.gp_err_generate_failed: Generation failed. Your credit has been refunded.
Painel.gp_err_session_expired: Session expired. Please log in again.
Painel.gp_err_upload_network: Network error during upload. Please try again.
Painel.gp_err_files_not_ready: Files not processed. Please try again.
Painel.gp_beta_tooltip: Experimental feature currently in testing. Results may vary.
